summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Restaurant QR Menu & Ordering App. Backend: 24/24 API tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major flows tested and working including customer menu, cart, checkout, admin login, dashboard, QR generator, kitchen display, order tracking, and protected routes.

ui_bugs.issue: Quantity +/- buttons have overlay interception issue - backdrop div blocks clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: Users can still remove items or add new items from menu. Not blocking checkout flow.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /auth/login with correct/wrong credentials (401/200)
Backend: GET /auth/me with/without token (200/401)
Backend: GET /menu returns 13 items with all required fields
Backend: GET /menu?category=Starters filters correctly (3 items)
Backend: POST /menu with auth creates item (200)
Backend: PUT /menu/{id} with auth updates item (200)
Backend: DELETE /menu/{id} with/without auth (200/401)
Backend: POST /orders creates order with status PENDING/PAID based on paymentId
Backend: GET /orders/{id} returns specific order (200)
Backend: GET /orders with/without auth (200/401)
Backend: PATCH /orders/{id}/status with auth updates status (200)
Backend: POST /tables with auth creates table (200)
Backend: GET /tables with/without auth (200/401)
Backend: POST /tables with duplicate tableNumber returns 400
Frontend: Home page loads with 13 menu items
Frontend: Category filters work (All, Starters, Main Course, Beverages, Desserts)
Frontend: Add to cart updates badge count
Frontend: Cart drawer opens with items and customer input fields
Frontend: WhatsApp and Razorpay checkout buttons present
Frontend: Admin login with wrong credentials shows error
Frontend: Admin login with admin/admin@123 redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows 4 stats cards (Total Orders, Today's Orders, Revenue, Active Orders)
Frontend: Orders tab displays orders with status dropdowns
Frontend: Menu tab shows form and menu items with edit/delete buttons
Frontend: QR Generator page allows adding tables and shows QR codes
Frontend: Kitchen Display shows 3-column Kanban (New Orders, In Kitchen, Ready to Serve)
Frontend: Order Tracking page shows timeline and order details
Frontend: Protected routes (/admin, /kitchen, /admin/qr) redirect to login when not authenticated

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 minor UI issue with cart quantity buttons)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix cart drawer overlay issue: The backdrop div (line 218 in MenuApp.jsx) is intercepting clicks on quantity +/- buttons. Consider adding pointer-events-none to backdrop or adjusting z-index of cart content.
